title: anil dimidiata
intro: Anil dimidiata, also known as Neem, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Africa. It has been used for centuries in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Anil dimidiata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and aiding in the management of diabetes and high blood pressure. Anil dimidiata can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is also used as a natural insect repellent and skin toner.
